name: Asset Management
description: Identify systems, data, software, and related assets so they can be governed and protected appropriately.

name: Risk Assessment
description: Assess cybersecurity risk using defined methods so decisions can be prioritized and managed consistently.

name: Identity Management and Access Control
description: Use identity and access controls to limit access to authorized users, devices, and services.

name: Data Security
description: Protect data through safeguards that preserve confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

name: Security Continuous Monitoring
description: Monitor systems and environments for anomalous activity and changes that may indicate risk.

name: Response Planning
description: Maintain and execute response planning so incidents are handled in a coordinated way.
